widget.name: EdtsForm
widget.description: Reusable form wrapper with content area and submit or cancel actions.

property.caption: Title
property.description: Optional form title shown at the top of the wrapper.

property.caption: Description
property.description: Optional supporting text shown below the title.

property.caption: Content
property.description: Place form fields and custom widgets inside this content area.

property.caption: Submit Caption
property.description: Caption shown on the primary submit button.

property.caption: Cancel Caption
property.description: Caption shown on the cancel button.

property.caption: Show Cancel Button
property.description: Show or hide the cancel action button.

property.caption: Submit On Enter
property.description: Submit the form when the user presses Enter inside the wrapper.

property.caption: On Submit
property.description: Action executed when the submit button is clicked or Enter is pressed.

property.caption: On Cancel
property.description: Action executed when the cancel button is clicked.

property.caption: Show Footer
property.description: Show or hide the footer action bar.

property.caption: Footer Align
property.description: Choose whether the footer buttons are aligned to the left or right.

property.caption: Full Width Buttons
property.description: Stretch footer action buttons to fill the available width.

property.caption: Compact Layout
property.description: Use tighter spacing for smaller forms.
